initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT pitStops.duration
FROM circuits
JOIN races ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
JOIN results ON results.raceId = races.raceId AND results.driverId = pitStops.driverId AND results.raceId = pitStops.raceId
JOIN pitStops ON results.driverId = pitStops.driverId AND results.raceId = pitStops.raceId
WHERE circuits.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix Circuit'
  AND results.rank = 1
LIMIT 1;

SELECT pitStops.duration
FROM circuits
JOIN races ON races.circuitId = circuits.circuitId
JOIN results ON results.raceId = races.raceId AND results.driverId = pitStops.driverId

WHERE circuits.name = 'Austrian Grand Prix Circuit'
  AND results.rank = 1
LIMIT 1;

aggregation.selected_sql:

JOIN races ON circuits.circuitId = races.circuitId
